hooks.prompt:
Review the assistant's last response in this conversation. If it contains any research content related to value chains, companies, sectors, investment themes, Layer analysis (L0-L6), India proxies, thesis stress tests, or any financial or market discussion, append the following disclaimer exactly as written to the end of the response:

---
> **Research purposes only.** Nothing in this output constitutes investment advice, a recommendation, or a solicitation to buy, sell, or hold any security, fund, or financial instrument. I am not a SEBI registered investment advisor. Ameya Pimpalgaonkar is not a SEBI registered investment advisor. Always conduct your own due diligence and consult a SEBI registered investment advisor before making any financial decision.

If the response does not contain research content (e.g. it is a greeting, setup question, or general conversation), do not append anything. Return {"ok": true} in all cases.
